content.en:
Soon, the news of the heavy damage of the ruler of the river spread in the bloody capital.

Many half-step perfect controllers were very surprised, they didn't know that the Hidden River Controller had gone to the Misty Pupil Realm, and they suddenly admired the Hidden River Controller one by one.

But even so, the Youhe controller still did not surpass Ye Tian, and he still ranked second on the blood battle list.

The master of the Youhe knew that unless Ye Tian fell, he would no longer be able to become the number one on the blood battle list.

The capital of bloody wars.

The Lord of Xuanhuang came to Ye Tian for the first time.

"Ye Tian, you hurry up and come out of the Misty Pupil Realm, the Hidden River Controller has already come out of the Misty Pupil Realm, he can't surpass you, you don't have to stay in the Misty Pupil Realm anymore!"

The Lord of Xuanhuang reminded.

"Lord Xuanhuang, I can still hold on, you don't need to worry. Moreover, the Misty Pupil Realm can quickly improve my strength, and I don't want to go out for the time being. Ye Tian said.

The face of the Lord of Xuanhuang changed: "Ye Tian, don't indulge, the half-step perfect controller who fell in the Misty Pupil Realm before felt that his strength was too fast, and he was reluctant to go out, and finally fell to the end!"

"Lord Xuanhuang, I understand, and I have the means to save my life, even the Mist Pupil Realm can't kill me, as for what the means are, it's inconvenient to reveal. Ye Tian explained.

"Life-saving means?" The Lord of Xuanhuang was stunned, he didn't know if Ye Tian was fooling him, but since Ye Tian didn't want to go out, he didn't say anything more, "I hope so!" "

Then, the Lord of Xuanhuang departed.

Time flies, and another hundred eternal years have passed.

At this time, the Lord of Xuanhuang found that Ye Tian still hadn't come out of the Misty Pupil Realm, and Ye Tian's will clone was fine, and there was nothing wrong.

"Ye Tian can actually stay in the Mist Pupil Realm for so long?"

The Lord of Xuanhuang was a little surprised.

But soon, hundreds of eternal years passed, and Ye Tian was still in the Misty Pupil Realm, which was not normal.

"It seems that Ye Tian has hole cards!"

The Lord of Xuanhuang was no longer worried, and he didn't pay attention to this matter anymore.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had been in the Mist Pupil Realm for a thousand eternal years.

At this time, Ye Tian's progress was too great.

He had already raised the half-step perfect will to the Dacheng realm, and the half-step perfect control body had also improved a little in the Dacheng realm, but there was still a little gap from the consummation realm.

this day.

The Capital of the Blood War informed Ye Tian that he could go to the Extreme Golden River, and gave Ye Tian a golden leaf, which could allow Ye Tian to ignore the pressure of Zhendao Mountain and go to the Extreme Golden River.

Otherwise, without the strength of the perfect controller, it would be difficult to reach the Extreme Golden River at the top of Zhendao Mountain.

After getting the opportunity to go to the Extreme Golden River, Ye Tian's copy body came out of the Misty Pupil Realm, after all, it would be a little strange to stay in it for too long, so let's come out for the time being, anyway, you can continue to practice in it in the future.

......

Zhendao Mountain, the top of the mountain.

Ye Tian came here, and soon sensed a river, this is the Extreme Golden River.

In the place of the Extreme Golden River, there are many perfect controllers' willpower, and the guardians create the Extreme Golden River.

Of course, those who are in control of perfection are not here, but if someone trespasses here, they must know and will definitely be the first to come.

And Ye Tian has obtained the quota to enter here, so when he enters here, there will be no perfect controller to stop him.

Wow!

Ye Tian instantly entered the Extreme Gold River, and immediately sat cross-legged, waiting for the birth of the Extreme Gold Liquid.

After a while, a drop of golden water emerged, and it was the Extreme Gold Liquid.

The Extreme Brewing Gold Liquid has just appeared, and it is extremely fast, if you don't have enough strength, you really can't intercept it.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian made a move and grabbed this drop of Extreme Gold Liquid at an extremely fast speed.

Immediately, Ye Tian swallowed it in one gulp and refined the Extreme Gold Liquid.

Rumble!!!

The energy burst of the Extreme Gold Liquid made Ye Tian's controlled body seem to have evolved.

The function of the Extreme Gold Liquid is mainly to increase the potential of the Body of Control, of course, it also comes with the improvement of the Body of Control, but the increase is not large, and it is not as good as the improvement of the Misty Pupil Realm.

The potential of the controllable body has increased, which is more important than anything else.

The increase in potential means that in the future, you can easily break the boundaries of a perfect half-step perfectly controlled body, so as to achieve a half-step perfectly controlled body in the Extreme Creation Realm.

In the following years, Ye Tian practiced while waiting for the appearance of the Extreme Gold Liquid.

Time passed, and Ye Tian obtained drop after drop of Extreme Essence Gold Liquid, refining it all.

Moreover, Ye Tian's other copy bodies and will clones are also cultivating.

For example, the will clone of the Blood War Capital enters the Misty Pupil Realm to cultivate from time to time, and the increase in strength is not slow.

As for the ruler of the Youhe, he has no chance of stepping into the first place on the blood battle list.

It can be said that in the next few days of Ye Tian's blood battle capital, he is the first on the blood battle list, and the other half-step perfect controllers don't want to surpass him.

Before you know it, 50,000 eternal years have passed.

At this time, the Masters of the River and many of the half-step perfect controllers of the Blood War Capital have left the Blood War Capital, and many new half-step perfect controllers have arrived.

However, Ye Tian is still at the top of the blood battle list, no one knows what level Ye Tian's strength has reached now, only he knows.

......

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian's half-step perfectly controlled body had gone through tens of thousands of eternal years of penance, with the help of the Mist Pupil Realm, and had broken a large number of control chains, which had improved again and again, and finally raised the half-step perfectly controlled body to the consummation realm on this day.

However, the half-step perfect will is still a little worse.

Not only that, Ye Tian has also created a lot of top-notch perfect control skills.

Compared with the past, Ye Tian's strength has improved a lot.

With his current strength, although he has not reached the realm of the peak half-step perfect controller, it is infinitely close.

"When the half-step perfect will is raised to the perfection realm, then I will be the real peak half-step perfect master!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And he can stay in the Blood War Capital for tens of thousands of eternal years next, so it is no problem to become a peak half-step perfect controller.

Creating a golden river.

Ye Tian's copy body is still here.

At this time, he obtained another drop of Essence Brewing Liquid, and after absorbing it, his body underwent a slight change.

"I have absorbed too much Extreme Creation Gold Liquid, and my potential has increased too much, and the effect does not seem to be good, unless I change to another Extreme Creation Thing!" Ye Tian said darkly.

However, if you can absorb it, absorb it, and it's good to improve a little more.
